name: Ruby Tech Corporation
summary: Ruby Tech Corporation manufactures and sells networking products in Taiwan. It offers PoE Ethernet and industrial switches; managed, Web-smart, unmanaged, PoE, mode, and industrial converters; fiber NICs; and OLT and ONU products, and splitters, as well as HW/SW customization services. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
